assertions.evidence: Document explicitly follows Stage 1 of PDD workflow with 'Stage 1 - Product Analysis & Requirement Definition' in header and references to Stage 2 preparation
Document created at specs/active/ location and references PRD template structure with all required sections
Starts with '用户需求分析' (User Needs Analysis) and '用户痛点' (User Pain Points), not code implementation
Includes quantifiable KPIs: social login usage rate 40%, registration conversion 60% to 80%, login success rate 85% to 95%
